name: Double Caramel Munchin' Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt margarine and caramel topping on high for 1 minute. Stir well to combine.
2. Pour the cereal, popcorn, and peanuts into a large resealable plastic bag.
3. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the cereal mixture inside the plastic bag.
4. Seal the bag and shake until all pieces are evenly coated with the caramel.
5. Transfer the contents of the bag to a large microwave-safe bowl.
6. Microwave on high for 1-1/2 to 4 minutes, stirring every minute until the caramel is fully melted and smooth.
7. Spread the mixture on waxed paper to cool completely.
8. Once cooled, store in an airtight container.
